_comment: Copy to .mcp.json and fill in real values. Never commit .mcp.json. Choose Option A or Option B below.
_optionA_local_build: Use this if you cloned the repo and ran npm run build
_optionB_npx: Use this if the package is published to npm — no clone or build needed

sap-transport._active: Option A — local build (replace path using: echo $(pwd)/dist/src/index.js)

_sap-transport-npx._active: Option B — npx (rename key to sap-transport and remove Option A block)
